signals.headline: Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors after 115-105 Game 2 win** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors after 115-105 Game 2 win** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 of their Eastern Conference first-round playoff series on Monday, securing a commanding 2-0 lead with standout performances from Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points).[1][2][3] C
